Infrastructure for
real-time agents
Telnyx owns the full stack from carrier network to AI inference, so there's nothing between your agent and the person on the other end. No handoffs. No lag. Just voice, messaging, and AI that keeps up.
EXPLORE THE STACK
TALK TO AN EXPERT
14,000+ INDUSTRY-LEADING COMPANIES choose telnyx
THE FULL STACK
Yesterday, infrastructure was provisioned via portals and tickets. Today, it's triggered by APIs. Tomorrow, it is autonomous.
Agent Control Plane and Runtime
Layers 6–9
Agent Execution & Memory
Intelligence lives inside the call. We bridge the gap by colocating GPUs with the live communications path.
Layers 4–5
Programmatic Identity & Compliance
Voice follows the user. We unified mobile and fixed identity layers under a single programmable control plane.
Layers 1–3
Owned Network
You cannot optimize what you do not own. Telnyx replaced the public internet with a bare-metal global communications fabric.
THE FULL STACK
Yesterday, infrastructure was provisioned via portals and tickets. Today, it’s triggered by APIs. Tomorrow, it is autonomous.
Layers 1–3 | Owned Network
01
Physical network and interconnect
02

03

Ready to build?
CONFIGURE AGENT
Layers 1–3
Layers 4–5
Layers 6–9
Owned Network
You cannot optimize what you do not own. Telnyx replaced the public internet with a bare-metal global communications fabric.
01
Physical network and interconnect
Bare-metal fiber and direct peering across global regions for agent-controlled, deterministic routing.
Next
AGENT PLATFORM
Infrastructure for AI agents. Every primitive, one platform.
From carrier network to co-located GPU compute, Telnyx owns every layer your agents need to run voice AI and inference in real time. No Frankenstack. No rented infrastructure. One control plane for inference, voice AI, and global communications. Configure once, deploy globally.
Inference
Voice Agent Builder
Speech to Text
Text to Speech
Global Numbers
Agent Skills
CHOOSE MODEL
MiniMax M3 MXFP8
Kimi
Kimi K2.5
Qwen3 235B A22B
GLM
GLM 5.2
CHAT TO AN AGENT
United States
Auto-detect
SEND MESSAGE
COMPETITION
Not retrofitted for agents. Built for them.
On most platforms, agents sit on top of UI-first products, constrained by rented infrastructure and manual approval paths. Telnyx is different. We’re the only agent-native platform that owns the primitives, not abstracting over someone else’s foundations.
FEATURE
Owns and controls the telephony stack for native calling.
Available
Not available
Not available
Not available
Co-located edge PoPs and GPUs to power low-latency Voice AI globally.
Available

Operates a private global network to bypasses the public internet for high-quality audio.
Available

SOLUTIONS
Transform workflows across your business.
Accelerate response times, lower costs, and improve accuracy with AI-driven voice automation.
EXPLORE OUR AI ASSISTANT
Healthcare
Reduce appointment no-shows with real-time reminders
Confirm, reschedule, or cancel appointments automatically, keeping calendars full and staff free from follow-ups.
LEARN MORE
about healthcare solutions
Reduce appointment no-shows with real-time reminders
Confirm, reschedule, or cancel appointments automatically, keeping calendars full and staff free from follow-ups.
Finance
Secure, compliant, and built for financial scale
Resolve customer queries, verifications, and alerts instantly with Voice AI agents.
LEARN MORE
about finance solutions
Retail and e-commerce
Simplify returns with always-on assistance
Let customers initiate returns, track orders, and get refunds via AI agents that solve problems on the first interaction.
LEARN MORE
about retail and eCommerce solutions
Travel and Hospitality
Drive more bookings, 24/7/365
Let travelers check availability, get answers, and book instantly with AI agents, no wait times and no missed opportunities.
LEARN MORE
about travel and hospitality solutions
SECURITY
Enterprise security, baked into the network
In the age of deepfakes and spoofing, the network is your only source of truth. Telnyx owns the infrastructure from fiber to GPU, so your voice AI agents and inference workloads run in-region, on a private network, with identity verified at the carrier level. No public internet handoffs. No cross-border data surprises. Just deterministic routing and compliance by default.
Where milliseconds matter, Telnyx delivers
From first call to global deployment, Telnyx gives you the stack, scale, and support to launch real-time conversational AI with confidence.
START BUILDING
CONTACT US
SUPPORTED LANGUAGES
100+
Languages and dialects supported with real-time, multilingual AI transcription and translation.
MILLISECONDS
<500
Voice AI end-to-end latency powered by Telnyx’s telecom edge PoPs and colocated GPUs.
COUNTRIES
140+
With numbering and voice resources, compliant communications trusted worldwide.

Pricing
Flexible, transparent pricing with discounts as you scale.
Pay as you go
Pay only for what you use, when you use it.
Top up your account through your Mission Control Portal.
Receive automatic discounts as you scale your calling and messaging volumes.
Access free in-house support 24/7 via chat or call.
Volume-based pricing
Do more; pay less.
Work with a dedicated sales representative to set discounted pricing based on your monthly usage.
Receive specialized support from a personally allotted customer success manager.
Receive prioritized ticketing privileges and NOC support.
Enjoy all the benefits at no extra cost
Free in-house support
Talk to a telecommunications specialist via chat or call, 24/7/365.
Portal access

Introduction
Copy page
Telnyx product guides and tutorials — AI voice assistants, global SMS/MMS, voice APIs, phone numbers, IoT SIM, and programmable networking, all in one place.
Copy page
​
Telnyx Developer Documentation
Telnyx is a carrier-owned communications and AI platform: programmable voice, messaging, phone numbers, wireless, AI inference, networking, and storage, delivered through one API on a privately operated global network. These docs cover every product with quickstarts, guides, API reference, and SDKs. Everything here is also machine-readable for AI agents — start at
llms.txt
.
​
What you’ll find here
Account setup
Complete guide to setting up and managing your Telnyx account, from initial
signup to account verification and upgrades.
AI
Incorporate AI into your applications with ease.
Real-time communications
Build powerful communication experiences with voice, messaging, video, and
fax capabilities.
IoT and networking
Connect devices globally with IoT SIM cards and build private networks with
enterprise-grade connectivity solutions.
Cloud storage
Telnyx Cloud Storage is S3-compatible distributed storage with low cost, low
latency, and easy migration from AWS S3.
Reporting
Access usage reports and debugging tools for your Telnyx account.
​
Need development resources?
For SDK setup, authentication, development tools, and cross-platform guides, check out our
Development section
.
​
Stay in the loop
Sign up for our developer newsletter to get product updates, API tips, and engineering insights.
*
Company Email
Subscribe
You can unsubscribe at any time. Read our
privacy policy
and
terms and conditions
.

Team PCP Strikes again – `telnyx` on PyPI gets compromised

analysis.name: Telnyx
analysis.value_proposition: Carrier-owned full-stack communications and AI platform delivering voice, messaging, and inference on a private global network for real-time AI agents.
analysis.ideal_customer: Developers and enterprises building real-time voice AI agents, contact centers, and global communications workflows that need low-latency, carrier-grade infrastructure

differentiators: Owns and controls the full telephony stack from fiber to GPU
Co-located edge PoPs with GPUs for low-latency global voice AI
Private global bare-metal network bypassing the public internet
Built-in programmatic 10DLC/KYC compliance enforced before execution
Carrier-level identity verification vs. public-internet handoffs
Only agent-native platform owning primitives instead of abstracting rented infra

complaints: Telnyx PyPI package compromised in supply-chain attack (multiple HN posts)
'Telnyx Knows Nothing' — critical HN post about company knowledge/support
FCC proposed $4M+ fine against Telnyx for apparently illegal robocall scheme
Supply-chain zero-day caught via semantic analysis (LiteLLM + Telnyx)

tiers.name: Pay as you go
tiers.headline_inclusions: Pay only for what you use; auto volume discounts; free 24/7 support via chat or call

tiers.name: Volume-based
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom discounted pricing, dedicated CSM, prioritized NOC/ticketing support

pricing.notes: Usage-based pricing across products (Messaging, Voice, SIP Trunking, STT, TTS, Numbers, Video, Verify, Fax, WhatsApp, IoT SIM, Mobile Voice, Networking, Cloud Storage, Inference); top up account via Mission Control Portal; automatic discounts at volume thresholds; specific per-product rates not extracted from landing but published on per-product pricing pages
